title: First Vaccine Demonstration
description: Edward Jenner demonstrates smallpox vaccination, launching modern immunization.

title: Expansion of Public Schooling
description: Compulsory and publicly funded education systems spread across Europe and North America.

title: World Health Organization Founded
description: WHO is established to coordinate international public health and disease control.

title: Global Child Mortality Monitoring Scales Up
description: International statistical systems begin regular cross-country mortality tracking.

title: Expanded Programme on Immunization
description: WHO starts a global initiative to increase vaccination against major childhood diseases.

title: Smallpox Declared Eradicated
description: WHO certifies global eradication of smallpox, a landmark in public health.

title: Global Poverty and Development Goals Era
description: International tracking of poverty reduction accelerates through coordinated targets.
sourceLabel: World Bank — Poverty and shared prosperity

title: Internet Adoption Enters Global Growth Phase
description: Rapid internet diffusion expands access to information, services, and communication worldwide.

title: Sustainable Development Goals Adopted
description: UN members align around measurable targets on health, education, equality, and poverty.

title: Global Scientific Collaboration at Scale
description: Cross-border research and publication networks expand rapidly, especially in biomedical sciences.
